up your the proper person to talk to you but if you could give me a call back at nine two zero eight five eight, I would really appreciate it thanks so much bye.

Thank you for calling the offices of C a Ventures, we are located at one thirty East Randolph Street suite twenty, one hundred in Chicago Illinois our office hours are eight thirty AM to five PM Central time Monday through Friday. If you know your party's four, digit extension you can dial it at any time to speak with the receptionist please press zero for directory by name please press one to repeat this menu.
